title: Mrs Kerala Contestant Arrested At Mumbai Airport With Hydroponic Cannabis Worth Rs 11.82 Crore After Arriving From Bangkok
description: A 28-year-old model and former Mrs Kerala beauty pageant contestant, Harsha Sunny, has been arrested at Mumbai airport after customs officials recovered hydroponic cannabis worth over Rs 11.82 crore from her luggage. The accused claimed an unknown passenger handed her the bag during the journey.
